case_title: VIOLA RYAN VS. SERRELL LAMONT WHITTLE JR.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY RYAN, VIOLA DBA VIOLA CLEAN HOUSE SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT WHITTLE JR., SERRELL LAMONT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-06-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RYAN, VIOLA DBA VIOLA CLEAN HOUSE SERVICES ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
FICTITIOUS BUSINESS NAME FILED BY PLAINTIFF RYAN, VIOLA DBA VIOLA CLEAN HOUSE SERVICES
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.00<WAIVED>). SERVED MAY-27-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WHITTLE JR., SERRELL LAMONT
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LEVINE. FILED BY RYAN, VIOLA DBA VIOLA CLEAN HOUSE SERVICES WHITTLE JR., SERRELL LAMONT
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-06-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-06-2011 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LEVINE.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-06-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RYAN, VIOLA DBA VIOLA CLEAN HOUSE SERVICES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WHITTLE JR., SERRELL LAMONT **PLAINTIFF DID NOT MAKE OUT CLAIM FOR HARASSMENT, OVERPAYMENT OF WAGES OR BUSINESS DISRUPTION AGAINST DEFENDANT.** STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-03-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED
